title: ranjithbday
text:
Birthday Surprise















  
  
  
  
  
  




  




  
    
      
        
      
      
         Happy happy birthday daddy! You're such an inspiring and cool person. Growing up, I always looked up to you. You've been such a supportive and caring figure in my life. From something as simple as trying to pump air into a broken 'h' balloon to helping me achieve a big milestone by pushing me to do my arangetram, you always showed your love and stood up for me all these years. Although we are thousands of miles away, I hope this mini website brought us a bit closer 🤍 
      
    
  

  
    
      
        
      
      
        HAPPY BIRTHDAY DADDY!
I can't believe you're already 52 because it just felt like yesterday when I would have to hear those terrible dad jokes or when you would randomly order chicken tandoori and leave mommy shocked haha. On a real note though, I know we've had our ups and downs but I will always appreciate everything that you do for me and our family. Hope you have an amazing dayyy! 
Cheers to many more years and many more bad jokes!
      
    
  

  
    
      
        
      
      
        
      
    
  



  
    

    
      
        Here’s a little something I found tucked away…  
        She may not be with us today but she's always wishing the best for you.
        Just a small random memory, but hopefully it gives you a sense of her presence. 
      

      
        
      
    
  






  Surprise 🎉




  



HAPPY BIRTHDAY DADDY 🎂


  A little smtg...
